items.name_en: 【Bvlgari】Mini Chain Bag is here 🥰 Bvlgari boutique new Serpenti Diamond Blast Chain Bag, available first 💗💗 Made of pink calfskin with three chain decorations. items.name_en: True factory goods, ZP-level genuine quality, we ensure all materials, hardware, stitching, and edges meet 100% authentic raw materials.
items.name_cn:
True factory goods, ZP-level genuine quality, we ensure all materials, hardware, stitching, and edges meet 100% authentic raw materials.
Mini BOOK TOTE Handbag (with shoulder strap)
Exclusive channel goods, the most cost-effective blue D mini shoulder strap version
Blue and beige Oblique print embroidery
Number: S5573CRIW_M928
Size Information
Size: 21.5x13x7.5 cm (LxHxW)
Fits 1 mobile phone, 1 card holder, and lipstick
Shoulder strap length: 68-124 cm
Top of strap to top of bag: 31-60 cm
Weight: approx. 289g
This mini size handbag is a new arrival from the 2024 Early Spring collection, carefully designed by Maria Grazia Chiuri to enrich the classic Dior Book Tote series.
Adorned with the brand's classic blue and beige Oblique print embroidery throughout, accented with the Christian Dior Paris logo.
This Dior Book Tote handbag showcases Dior's exquisite craftsmanship, featuring a detachable, adjustable shoulder strap for carrying by hand, on the shoulder, or crossbody.
Front features the Christian Dior Paris logo
Detachable, adjustable shoulder strap
Includes box

items.name_cn:
BOOK TOTE Medium
White and Blue
Has a dreamy retro feel
The bag body uses exquisite pure handmade embroidery craftsmanship
Full texture, the 3D full embroidery has a textured feel
Iconic tiger embroidery spliced with cowhide🌟
More business suitable for commuting
The bag shape is stiffer and more structured
With a shoulder strap, practicality up!
Capacity is still very considerable
Size: 36.5*28*17.5cm
Model: 1324#

items.name_cn:
Black and white tiger, Small
DIOR book tote 24 new version
The Jouy print Zoo series is here!
I have to say, Dior really knows how to play
A tote bag you can carry! Simply amazing
A new hit derived from the most classic tote
More and more people love carrying large bags; truly unisex
Whether handheld or crossbody, commuting, gym, or business trips are no problem
Overall structured and won't collapse, I wish I could wear it every day
Large bag lovers can buy with confidence!!
26×12×21cm #

items.name_en: 💙💙 This Dior Book Tote bag, designed by Dior Women's Creative Director Maria Grazia Chiuri, is a flagship piece embodying Dior aesthetics. It can hold various daily essentials, meticulously crafted from blue Denim Dior Oblique jacquard fabric, reinterpreting Dior's classic pattern with an irregular stone-washed effect to showcase modern charm. Small size, featuring a contrasting Christian Dior Paris logo on the front, showcasing Dior's exquisite craftsmanship, and can be carried by hand.

items.name_en: 2024 New Color. This Book Tote bag, designed by Dior Women's Creative Director Maria Grazia Chiuri, is a flagship piece embodying Dior aesthetics. Adorned with mint green and off-white Reverse Joules print embroidery throughout, it reinterprets the classic pattern with a contrasting effect, perfect for holding various daily essentials. Medium size, featuring a Christian Dior Paris logo on the front, showcasing Dior's exquisite craftsmanship, and can be carried by hand or over the shoulder.

items.name_cn:
Mini Black in stock!!️
Book Tote Mini series, another little cutie. The petite shape is very elegant, especially suitable for summer wear, not as bulky. It's perfectly fine for holding a phone, cushion, lipstick, etc. The bag is carefully crafted from imported calfskin, featuring a classic oversized houndstooth pattern paired with light gold metal letter charms. The look is amazing.
size:21.5*7.5*13cm
7001
